response.justification: Candidate is a strong generalist full-stack engineer with deep web/backend experience, but the role requires native-level Japanese (not listed), strong C for UNIX/embedded development, Linux kernel modification experience, and LAN-switch security domain expertise (MACsec, 802.1X, NETCONF, switch chips). The resume shows only brief C/C++ exposure at National Instruments a decade ago and no embedded networking or security-protocol background.
strengths: Long track record as a senior engineer across diverse stacks and platforms
Some C/C++ experience at National Instruments on a developer-tools product
Strong testing/TDD discipline and Linux familiarity
concerns: No native-level Japanese proficiency indicated (hard requirement)
No embedded firmware, LAN-switch, or security-protocol experience (MACsec, 802.1X, NETCONF)
No Linux kernel source-modification experience demonstrated

key_factors.factor: Lack of embedded networking/security domain experience
Senior engineering experience and Linux familiarity
